title: Ogden, UT — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ogden, UT: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ogden is a city in UT with a population of 88,000. Historic rail city at the foot of the Wasatch Mountains with outdoor recreation.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
